_comment: FALSE POSITIVE — SP-100001: Legitimate IT automation script using encoded PS
scenario: IT automation tool (Ansible/SCCM/DSC) uses encoded PowerShell for legitimate configuration management
why_fp: Parent process is CcmExec.exe (SCCM agent) — known automation context
Host is MGMT-SERVER-01 (known management server, in CMDB)
Time is 06:00 — matches SCCM maintenance schedule
Running as SYSTEM — expected for agent-driven automation
tuning_recommendation: Allowlist specific parent process + host combinations: CcmExec.exe on known management servers
Suppress alerts where SubjectUserName=SYSTEM AND ParentProcessName matches known automation agents
Allowlist DSC-configured hosts by network segment (management VLAN)
